selection_rule: Select checkpoints and structural detail gain by validation YOLO mAP50 only; held-out test is evaluated after selection.

pothole.reason: Best mean validation mAP50 over motion, defocus, and low-light among v25 epochs; stronger detail gains did not improve mean validation mAP50.

pcm.reason: Best mean validation mAP50 over motion, defocus, and low-light among v25 epochs; stronger detail gains did not improve mean validation mAP50.

promotion_decision.reason: v25 is a clean structural improvement and improves mAP50-95 in most same-detector 320px test comparisons, but it is not a large mAP50 gain over v24 and was not rerun for the full 640px paper baseline suite.
